title: Suspected ransomware encryption

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Files renamed with strange extension on shared drive
servicenow_seed.description: User reports many shared files now end in .locked and ransom note text files appeared in the folder.

correct_steps: Tell user to stop activity and do not delete evidence
Identify affected machine, share path, and time noticed
Isolate endpoint from network if policy/tool allows
Escalate immediately to Security Operations as P1
Notify caller that security team will follow up
rationale: Possible ransomware is a security incident. Speed and preservation matter more than normal troubleshooting.
